hero-desc: Mataram Dev is a community of makers, designers & innovators based in Mataram, Lombok - Indonesia.
about-p1: We started as a small group of friends who wanted to learn coding together. Now we’re a growing community of tech enthusiasts — from high college students to professional developers — who meet regularly to share knowledge, build projects, and support each other.
about-mission-text: Make a place where anyone can start their journey and grow as a professional in technology, whatever their background and experience.
act-wfc-desc: Every Wednesday we gather to work on open-source or personal projects, solve coding challenges, or just learn something new together while enjoying a cup of coffee.
act-meetup-desc: Monthly meetups where members share their experiences and knowledge in a relaxed environment, build networks, and connect with like-minded individuals from all across backgrounds.
act-colab-desc: Got an idea? Find teammates here. We regularly kick off small group projects so everyone can build a real portfolio (Check Our Github).
act-bootcamp-desc: We run coding bootcamps and language classes for members who want to learn new skills. From web development to English & Japanese, we got you covered.
act-fun-desc: We also organize fun activities like game nights, hackathons, and social events to keep the community spirit alive and strong.
proj-website-desc: The official community website of Mataram Dev, built collaboratively by members using HTML, CSS, and vanilla JS.
proj-dir-desc: A registry of developers, designers, and tech talents based in Lombok to help local talents get discovered.
proj-bot-desc: Discord/Telegram bot helping members find coding materials, practice problems, and get community news alerts.
res-roadmap-desc: Curated learning path from zero to professional web developer, tailor-made for our community.
res-oss-desc: Learn how to make your first pull request, write clean commit messages, and participate in our projects.
res-tools-desc: A collection of free hosting, design assets, and development utilities to build your MVP without cost.
join-desc: Fill out the form below or chat with us on WhatsApp. All levels are welcome, from beginners to professionals.
blog1-title: Start Learning Web Development with the Community
blog1-desc: My experience learning coding from scratch to building my own website — and how the community helped at every step.
blog2-title: Work From Cafe: Productivity Tips for Coding in Co-working Spaces
blog2-desc: From choosing outlets to cafe etiquette — a complete work-from-cafe guide for developers.
blog3-title: Recap: Sharing Session AI & Machine Learning
blog3-desc: Having fun learning AI with community members. From basic concepts to practice using TensorFlow.
blog4-title: From WhatsApp Group to Tech Community
blog4-desc: The origin story of Mataram Dev — how a casual chat in a small group turned into weekly meetups.
evt-meetup1-desc: First official meetup of Mataram Dev: Members shared their coding journey, learned from each other, build connections, and discussed future projects.
evt-tailwind-desc: Hands-on workshop: build a landing page from scratch using Tailwind CSS. No previous CSS experience needed.
evt-opensource-desc: Bring your laptop and contribute to an open-source project together. Beginners very welcome — we’ll help you make your first PR.
evt-hackathon-desc: 24-hour hackathon building apps that solve local problems. Teams of 3-4. Prizes for top 3 teams!
